TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.FlexI.title: FlexItemLayout
TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.FlexI.description: Defines the flex layout properties of a control inside a TcHmiFlexContainer.

propertiesMeta.name: flex
propertiesMeta.description:
CSS flex shorthand property to define how the control will grow or shrink. 
Example: '1 1 auto' allows the control to grow and shrink as needed, '0 0 auto' prevents it.

propertiesMeta.name: order
propertiesMeta.description: CSS order property to define the order of the control within a TcHmiFlexContainer.

propertiesMeta.name: alignSelf
propertiesMeta.description: CSS align-self property to override the align-items value for a specific control within a TcHmiFlexContainer.

TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.FlexA.description: Defines the align-self value for a control within a TcHmiFlexContainer.

TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.GridI.title: GridItemLayout
TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.GridI.description: Defines the grid layout properties of a control inside a TcHmiGridContainer.

propertiesMeta.name: gridColumn
propertiesMeta.description:
CSS grid-column property to define the column position and span of the control within a TcHmiGridContainer. 
Example: '1 / 3' places the control from column 1 to 2 (span of 2 columns), '2' places the control in column 2 with a default span of 1.

propertiesMeta.name: gridRow
propertiesMeta.description:
CSS grid-row property to define the row position and span of the control within a TcHmiGridContainer. 
Example: '1 / 3' places the control from row 1 to 2 (span of 2 rows), '2' places the control in row 2 with a default span of 1.

propertiesMeta.name: gridArea
propertiesMeta.description: CSS grid-area property to define the area position and span of the control within a TcHmiGridContainer.

propertiesMeta.name: justifySelf
propertiesMeta.description: CSS justify-self property to define the horizontal alignment of the control within its grid cell in a TcHmiGridContainer.

propertiesMeta.name: alignSelf
propertiesMeta.description: CSS align-self property to define the vertical alignment of the control within its grid cell in a TcHmiGridContainer.

TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiControl.GridJ.description: Defines the justify-self or align-self value for a control within a TcHmiGridContainer.
